name: Boon of Combat Prowess
uses: PB
notes: When you miss with an attack roll, you can turn it into a hit a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
uses: PB
notes: As a bonus action, teleport up to 30 feet a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Energy Resistance
notes: Gain resistance to one damage type; you can further reduce that damage once per turn.

name: Boon of Fate
uses: PB
notes: Add or subtract a d10 from a creature’s d20 roll within 60 ft, a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Fortitude
notes: Increase maximum HP by 40; when you would be reduced to 0 HP, you can instead regain HP equal to your Constitution modifier. You can’t do so again until the start of your next turn.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
notes: Your bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage ignores resistance.

name: Boon of Luck
uses: PB
notes: Reroll failed d20 tests a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Recovery
notes: As a bonus action, regain significant HP once per long rest.

name: Boon of Skill
notes: Gain proficiency in all skills and add a bonus die to ability checks.

name: Boon of Speed
notes: Speed increases; opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage.

name: Boon of Truesight
notes: Gain truesight (commonly 60 ft).

name: Boon of the Night Spirit
uses: PB
notes: Enhanced darkvision; can become invisible in dim light/darkness a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Archery
uses: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

name: Blind Fighting
uses: Blindsight 10 ft.

name: Defense
uses: +1 bonus to AC while wearing armor.

name: Dueling
uses: +2 damage when wielding a single one-handed melee weapon.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
uses: Treat 1s and 2s on damage dice as 3s for two-handed/versatile melee weapons.

name: Interception
uses: Reaction: reduce damage to an ally within 5 ft by 1d10 + PB.

name: Protection
uses: Reaction: impose disadvantage on attacks against an adjacent ally.

name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
uses: +2 damage with thrown weapons.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
uses: Add ability modifier to off-hand attack damage.

name: Unarmed Fighting
uses: Unarmed strike damage increases; deal extra damage to a grappled creature each turn.

name: Alert
notes: "Add your Proficiency Bonus to Initiative; after rolling
column17: you may swap Initiative with a willing ally."

name: Crafter
uses: Gain proficiency with three artisan’s tools; 20% discount on nonmagical items; craft temporary gear after a long rest.

name: Healer
notes: "A creature spends a Hit Die and regains extra HP; reroll 1s on dice used for any healing purpose."

name: Lucky
uses: PB
notes: Spend Luck Points to gain advantage on a d20 test or impose disadvantage on an attack against you.

name: Magic Initiate
resistances: "Learn 2 cantrips and 1 1st-level spell; cast the spell once per long rest for free."

name: Musician
notes: "Proficiency with three instruments; grant Heroic Inspiration to allies after a rest."

name: Savage Attacker
notes: "Once per turn
column17: roll weapon damage twice and use either result."

name: Skilled
notes: "Gain proficiency in three skills or tools of your choice."

name: Tavern Brawler
notes: "Improve unarmed strikes; proficiency with improvised weapons; push on hit."

name: Tough
notes: "Increase maximum HP by double your level; gain +2 HP per level thereafter."

name: Actor
notes: "Advantage on Deception/Performance while disguised; mimicry contested by Insight."

name: Athlete
notes: "Climb speed; stand with 5 ft movement; improved running jumps."

name: Charger
notes: "Dash distance +10 ft; moving 10+ ft before a melee hit adds damage or pushes target."

name: Crossbow Expert
notes: "Ignore Loading; no disadvantage in melee; add modifier to bonus attack damage."

name: Crusher
uses: "Bludgeoning hits can push; critical hits grant advantage to allies."

name: Defensive Duelist
notes: "Reaction: add PB to AC against a melee attack."

name: Dual Wielder
notes: "Use two-weapon fighting with more weapons; draw/stow two weapons."

name: Durable
uses: "Advantage on death saves; spend Hit Die as bonus action to heal."

name: Grappler
notes: "Unarmed strikes can grapple; advantage vs grappled targets; move grappled creatures."

name: Great Weapon Master
notes: "Extra damage with heavy weapons; bonus attack on crit or kill."

name: Polearm Master
notes: "Bonus attack with polearm; reaction attack when enemies enter reach."

name: Sentinel
notes: "Opportunity attacks stop movement; trigger on disengage or ally attacks."

name: Sharpshooter
notes: "Ignore cover; no disadvantage at long range or in melee for ranged attacks."

name: Skulker
notes: "Blindsight 10 ft; advantage on Stealth in combat; missed attacks don’t reveal position."

name: Slasher
uses: "Reduce speed on hit; critical hits impose disadvantage on attacks."

name: Speedy
notes: "Speed +10 ft; ignore difficult terrain when dashing; opportunity attacks vs you have disadvantage."

name: War Caster
uses: Advantage on concentration saves; cast spells as reactions; perform somatic components with hands occupied.

name: Weapon Master
uses: "Gain mastery with a chosen weapon type; change after a long rest."
